name: Brilliant
description: Learn math, science, and CS through guided interactive problem solving. Covers calculus, probability, neural networks, and more with visual, hands-on lessons.

name: Coursera
description: University-backed online courses and degrees from top institutions like Google, Stanford, and IBM. Audit most for free.

name: CS50
description: Harvard's intro computer science course — free online. Covers C, Python, SQL, web dev, and AI. One of the most-watched MOOCs ever. Certificate available.

name: Duolingo
description: Gamified language learning with bite-sized daily lessons. Supports 40+ languages with free and ad-free premium tiers.

name: edX
description: Free online courses and verified certificates from 160+ universities and companies. Covers STEM, humanities, and business.

name: freeCodeCamp
description: Free, self-paced coding curriculum covering web dev, data science, and machine learning with certifications.

name: GeeksForGeeks
description: Computer science portal with programming tutorials, DSA explanations, interview prep, and hands-on coding exercises.

name: Khan Academy
description: Completely free education platform covering maths, science, computing, history, and test prep for all ages.

name: LeetCode
description: Platform for coding interview prep. Solve algorithm and data structure challenges ranked by difficulty across many languages.

name: MDN Web Docs
description: Mozilla's authoritative reference for HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The definitive docs every web developer bookmarks.

name: Roadmap.sh
description: Community-driven developer roadmaps and learning guides. Find step-by-step paths for becoming a frontend, backend, DevOps, or AI engineer.

name: Scrimba
description: Interactive coding platform with scrimmages — code directly inside tutorial videos. Learn React, JavaScript, CSS, and more by editing the instructor's code live.

name: The Odin Project
description: Free, open-source full-stack web development curriculum. A structured path from zero to hireable developer covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node, and Rails.

name: Udemy
description: Marketplace of 200,000+ online courses in tech, business, design, and more. Frequent deep discounts bring most courses under $15.

name: W3Schools
description: Beginner-friendly web development tutorials for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, Python, and more. Includes interactive editors.

name: Wikipedia
description: The world's largest free online encyclopaedia. Over 60 million articles in 300+ languages, maintained by volunteers.
